q: A restaurant offers 3 types of soup and 4 types of main courses. In how many ways can a customer choose one soup and one main course?
A person can travel from city A to city B by 3 different trains and by 4 different buses. In how many ways can he travel from A to B?
Evaluate: \( \frac{6!}{4!} \)
If \( n! = 720 \), what is the value of \( n \)?
Evaluate: \( ^8P_3 \)
If \( ^nP_2 = 56 \), what is the value of \( n \)?
Evaluate: \( ^7C_3 \)
If \( ^{12}C_r = ^{12}C_5 \) and \( r \neq 5 \), what is the value of \( r \)?
If \( ^nC_2 = 21 \), what is the value of \( n \)?
In how many ways can the letters of the word 'PENCIL' be arranged?
A committee of 3 members is to be chosen from 5 people. In how many ways can this be done?
In how many ways can 5 different books be arranged on a shelf if a specific book must always be at the first position?
How many permutations can be made from the letters of the word 'APPLE'?
How many permutations can be made from the letters of the word 'BANANA'?
How many 5-digit codes can be formed using the digits 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 exactly once, such that the code does not end in 5?
How many subsets does a set with 5 elements have?
How many subsets containing exactly 2 elements can be formed from a set of 6 elements?
In how many ways can a team of 2 men and 2 women be selected from 4 men and 5 women?
How many lines can be determined by 6 points, no three of which are collinear?
How many triangles can be formed by 7 points, no three of which are collinear?
How many 3-digit even numbers can be formed using the digits 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 without repetition?
Simplify: \( \frac{(n+1)!}{(n-1)!} \)
Which of the following scenarios describes a combination?
a: Selecting a committee of 3 from 10 people

q: How many 4-letter codes can be formed using the letters of the word 'EQUATION' without repetition?
What is the value of \( ^8C_0 + ^8C_1 + \dots + ^8C_8 \)?
How many ways can 4 fruits be selected from 9 fruits so as to always include the largest fruit?
In how many ways can 5 people be arranged in a row if 2 specific people must always stand together?
How many permutations of the letters of the word 'SUCCESS' can be formed?
A set A contains 8 distinct elements. How many subsets of A contain at most 1 element?
How many permutations of the letters of the word 'PROGRAM' can be formed if they do not end in two R's?
